mapper.sql: order_id, old_status, reason, images, status, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `product_order_refund_apply` WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT a.*, b.order_no, b.user_id, b.phone, b.nick_name, b.shop_id, b.shop_name, b.product_id, b.product_no, b.product_name, b.specification, b.unit, b.is_virtual, b.num, b.amount FROM `product_order_refund_apply` as a INNER JOIN `product_order` as b ON a.order_id = b.id
AND b.`shop_id` = #{param.searchField4} AND a.`status` = #{param.searchIntStatus}
AND b.`order_no` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.searchStrField1}, '%')
AND b.`product_name` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.searchStrField2}, '%')
AND (b.phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{param.keyword},'%') OR b.nick_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{param.keyword},'%'))
AND a.`create_time` BETWEEN #{param.startTime} AND #{param.endTime}
ORDER BY a.`id` desc

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `product_order_refund_apply` a INNER JOIN `product_order` b ON a.order_id = b.id INNER JOIN `shop` s ON b.shop_id = s.id WHERE a.status = 1 AND s.merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND s.delete_time IS NULL
